positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic forest stag standing proudly in a field of ethereal wildflowers. The stag has strong, geometric silhouettes and glossy antlers. The composition is highly centered, utilizing deep indigo blues, forest greens, and touches of gold foil accents. Style: Neo-Art Deco illustration meets modern woodcut engraving. Lighting should be dramatic, high contrast, and directional, emphasizing crisp edges and negative space. Perfect for apparel print, with a clean, repeating border structure.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, messy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, cartoon, photorealism
